Look at @../../docs/BackgroundAndFeatures

Please answer the questions in the document.

Please design a system that allows me to run a single
bash script called yrPublish.sh that is a Quarto wrapper.
The yrPublsih.sh script should have options for 

- creating an initial yrPublish repo
- rendering the repo   (see @
- previewing the repo
- renumbering the chapters (as in @yrRenumberChapters)
- applying the new chapter numbers (as in @yrChapterNumber)


The script should recognize if t
